response.global_analysis: The video segment consists of a dialogue between Takanashi Kiara and IRyS, followed by a transition to an instrumental music segment with on-screen text. I have transcribed the English dialogue precisely to the audio waveform. Per the 'Golden Rule', I have ignored the song lyrics provided in the Reference JSON as this clip only contains the instrumental outro. I have also transcribed and translated the key on-screen text shown during the final slideshow.
